headline: Spacious 2BHK near Ruby Hospital, balcony, semi furnished
details: Bright 2bhk with balcony. Metro commute friendly and family safe. Wifi, geyser, lift available. Rent 16500 deposit 33000. Non-veg okay.

headline: 3BHK in Salt Lake Sector V, fully furnished
details: 3bhk for IT professionals, pets allowed, quiet building, ac in master bedroom, parking, lift. Family preferred. Rent 32000 deposit 64000.

headline: 1 room in New Town shared flat, female only
details: Remote workers welcome. no pets. veg only. wifi, common kitchen, geyser. Single sharing, semi furnished, 9000 rent.

headline: Cozy 1BHK studio near Park Street, fully furnished
details: Studio apartment with all amenities. wifi, ac, geyser, lift, parking. Rent 18000 deposit 36000. Couple friendly.

headline: Triple sharing male PG in Garia, meals included
details: Affordable PG with 3 beds. meals included, laundry, wifi. Walking distance to Garia bus stand. Rent 6500.

headline: Looking for flatmate - 2BHK in Tollygunge
details: Working professional looking for one female flatmate. Double sharing room with attached bath. Quiet, near Tollygunge metro. wifi, geyser. Rent 11500 deposit 23000.

headline: 2BHK in New Alipore, semi furnished
details: Quiet residential building with parking, lift, 24x7 water and power backup. Rent 27000 deposit 54000. Family preferred.
